purpose: Fine-tuning and RAG for GitaGPT — an AI oracle grounded in the Bhagavad Gita

data/raw/chapters.csv.description: 18 chapters with Sanskrit names, summaries in EN/HI, themes, and modern mappings

data/raw/chapters.json.description: Same as above in JSON format

data/raw/key_verses.csv.description: 108 most important shlokas with full Sanskrit, transliteration, EN/HI/SA translations, purport, and modern question mappings

data/raw/key_verses.json.description: Same as above in JSON format

data/raw/concept_glossary.csv.description: Sanskrit philosophical terms with meanings and modern equivalents

data/raw/concept_glossary.json.description: Same as above in JSON format

data/qa_pairs/qa_training_pairs.csv.description: Q&A training pairs: modern life questions → Krishna-voiced responses citing actual shlokas

data/qa_pairs/qa_training_pairs.json.description: Same as above in JSON format

data/processed/finetune_instruction_form.description: Training data in instruction-input-output format (Alpaca/LLaMA style)

data/processed/finetune_chatml_format.js.description: Training data in ChatML format (Mistral/Llama-3/GPT-4 style)

data/processed/problem_verse_mapping.csv.description: Mapping of modern problems/keywords to relevant Gita verses for RAG retrieval

data/processed/problem_verse_mapping.jso.description: Same as above in JSON format
